scripts.dev: concurrently -k "bun run dev:renderer" "bun run dev:ts" "bun run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/electron/main.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.build: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:main
scripts.build:exe: bun run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.build:local: bun run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never --config.win.target=dir
